name: Hookdeck
description: Hookdeck — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Event Streaming.

seo.title: Hookdeck Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score

review.verdict: Hookdeck is a Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure tool.
pros: Managed pub/sub infrastructure removes server ops burden
review.best_for: Apps with live features: chat, collaboration, gaming
review.not_for: Purely request-response apps with no real-time needs
